reasoning: The question asks if Ethereum will reach $2,600 on Binance (1-minute High candle) at any point in March 2026. Data up to March 15, 2026, shows that Ethereum is currently trading around $2,100 (having dropped slightly to $2,099.77). Throughout the first half of March, the price was bound between $1,800 and $2,200, having been around $2,161 on March 4. To hit $2,600 before the end of the month, Ethereum would need a price surge of roughly 24% from current levels in a timeframe of just 16 days. Since its peak near $5,000, it has faced downward pressure due to recession fears, structural factors, and whale sales. The market estimates the probability was only 21% as far back as March 6, when the price might have been marginally higher. Given continued bearish momentum breaking support at $2,100, the probability of returning to $2,600 in the next two weeks has decreased significantly. Upgrades ("Glamsterdam") are aimed for 'H1 2026' but not explicitly hitting late March. The remaining probability rests entirely on the high volatility of crypto markets enabling ~25% swings over two weeks, which is rare but possible. I'll estimate 4%.
